overall.description: A nighttime drive through the outskirts of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The vehicle travels along a winding, palm-lined highway with neon street lighting, passing other cars before stopping at a scenic overlook to reveal a panoramic view of the illuminated skyline against a hazy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass transitioning to open road

events.description: vehicle exits covered overpass into open night sky with full moon visible
vehicle accelerates onto open highway, passing under linear streetlights

agents.ego_description: driving forward under an overpass and emerging onto a multi-lane highway lined with palm trees

notable_agents.action: vehicle traveling ahead in the same lane, taillights visible

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure with metal beams overhead
tall palm trees lining both sides of the highway
futuristic horizontal LED streetlight bars emitting white light
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible in the distance
rocky terrain with sparse vegetation on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete highway overpass with limited sky visibility. As the vehicle emerges at 1.5 seconds, the full moon becomes visible in the hazy night sky above a palm-lined highway. The road stretches forward toward a distant illuminated city skyline, with rocky hillsides on the left and futuristic linear streetlights lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with palm tree median

events.description: vehicle overtakes a white car on the left side of the highway
oncoming traffic approaches from the opposite direction with headlights visible

agents.ego_description: cruising along the highway at steady speed, overtaking slower vehicles and navigating gentle curves

notable_agents.action: white sedan being overtaken on the left, moving slower than ego vehicle

entered.detail: glowing green holographic advertisement display on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle cruises along a wide-open coastal highway lined with palm trees on both sides. The road is illuminated by futuristic linear streetlights while the distant city skyline grows slightly larger ahead. Traffic is light with occasional vehicles to overtake and oncoming traffic visible. A green holographic billboard appears on the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain highway with illuminated guardrails

events.description: vehicle enters a sharp right-hand curve along the mountainside
city skyline becomes significantly more detailed with visible neon lighting on buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating winding mountain curves, following the road as it bends right with the city skyline now prominent ahead

notable_agents.action: large truck with bright headlights approaching from the opposite direction on the winding road

entered.detail: guardrail with integrated yellow lighting and reflective chevron signs indicating curves
yellow directional arrow signs mounted on the guardrail showing left curves
steep rocky cliff face on the left side of the winding road

segments.scene_description: The highway becomes a winding mountain road with illuminated guardrails and chevron signs marking the curves. The vehicle navigates right-hand bends with a rocky cliff on the left and palm trees now primarily on the right. The city skyline ahead becomes much more detailed with distinct neon-lit skyscrapers visible through the haze, and occasional oncoming traffic appears around the bends.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic mountain overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: vehicle slows to a stop at the scenic overlook, transitioning from driving to stationary
camera pans across the panoramic view of the cyberpunk city skyline from the overlook

agents.ego_description: stopped at the scenic overlook, observing the panoramic view of the illuminated cyberpunk city below

entered.detail: rocky outcrop and terrain at the scenic viewpoint overlooking the valley
the winding highway visible below the overlook, showing the path traveled
tall skyscrapers with bright neon blue and red lighting, clearly visible from the overlook

segments.scene_description: The vehicle comes to a stop at a scenic mountain overlook, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk city below. The camera pans across the skyline, showcasing densely packed neon-lit skyscrapers with blue and red illumination against the hazy night sky. The highway is now visible winding through the valley below, with rocky terrain in the foreground framing the futuristic metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from the sheltered confines of a highway overpass toward a sweeping panoramic vista of a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins beneath a concrete structure before emerging into the open air, where a full moon hangs over a palm-lined highway stretching toward a distant, glowing skyline. As the vehicle cruises along the coastal route, the environment opens up with futuristic linear streetlights and a green holographic billboard appearing beside the road. The scene then shifts as the highway winds into a mountain pass, navigating sharp bends marked by illuminated guardrails and chevron signs while the city skyscrapers grow increasingly detailed through the haze. Finally, the vehicle comes to a stop at a scenic overlook, where the camera pans across a breathtaking expanse of blue and red neon towers overlooking the valley below.
